CRANK_TYPE_002 — function value declared in memory or state typespec.

The memory or state type declared via `use Crank, memory: T, states: [...]`
references function/module values. Crank.Typing rejects these because
data, not behaviour, must be carried — module values in state break
serialisation and the saga discipline.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/typing_test.exs.
- test/support/typing_fixtures.ex.
